title: Portugal just ran on 100% renewable energy for six days - JOE.co.uk
description: Incredible news Portugal has reportedly broke a record for energy production after going six days relying entirely on renewable energy. This apparently includes everything from electrical applianes in home and work, all were running on either wind, hydro, or solar power for six days straight. Between 4:00AM on 31 October and 9:00AM on 6 November, […]
bodyText: How hot is too hot to work under UK law as red weather warnings issued
